changelog: CI/CD: the cross-platform **build matrix** (Windows x64, Linux x64/arm64, macOS x64/arm64) now runs on every push to `main` and every PR — not only on tag pushes. Binaries for all five targets are produced and uploaded as workflow artifacts on every commit, so regressions on any OS are caught immediately.
The lightweight `ci` job (linux-x64 build + version-sync check) is now PR-only, since `main` pushes already trigger the full matrix.
Publishing to a GitHub Release still happens **only** on `v*` tag pushes or manual `workflow_dispatch` — regular commits build but don't publish.
